  • Glossary
  • Reference

Generic methods for the XH component

Source: R/human-help.R
XH_functions.Rd

The functions that define XH:

  • dXHdt – compute derivatives

  • Update_XHt – update state variables

  • F_H – compute host population density

  • F_I – compute infectious host population size

  • F_infectivity – compute infectivity (pre-erythrocytic immunity)

  • F_ni – compute net infectiousness

  • F_prevalence – compute true prevalence

  • F_pfpr_by_lm – compute prevalence by light microscopy

  • F_pfpr_by_rdt – compute prevalence by RDT

  • F_pfpr_by_pcr – compute prevalence by PCR

  • get_HTC – compute human transmitting capacity

  • setup_XH_obj – set up the XH module object

  • setup_XH_ix – set index values

  • setup_XH_inits – set up initial values

  • get_XH_inits – get initial values

  • change_XH_inits – change initial values

  • get_XH_vars – list state variables

  • get_XH_ix – get variable indices

  • get_XH_pars – get parameters

  • change_XH_pars – change parameters

  • change_H – change host population density

  • parse_XH_orbits – parse outputs

  • get_XH_orbits – get saved orbits

  • get_PR – get prevalence from orbits

  • steady_state_X – compute X steady state given FoI and H

  • steady_state_XH – compute XH steady state given FoI

  • xds_plot_X – plot X outputs

  • check_XH – run consistency checks

  • skill_set_XH – return module skill set

Developed by David L. Smith, Sean L. Wu.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
